## 🤖 AI-Generated dbt Documentation

> This PR was created automatically by the **Agentic dbt Librarian**.

### What Changed
- Generated `schema.yml` documentation for model: **{model_name}**
- Source model: `{file_path}`

### AI Confidence
The Librarian used **Impact Prompting** — every description answers:
1. **What is it?** (technical definition)
2. **Why does it exist?** (business purpose)
3. **What breaks if it's wrong?** (risk / downstream impact)

### Review Checklist
- [ ] Model-level description accurately reflects business purpose
- [ ] Column descriptions are correct for all primary and foreign keys
- [ ] Monetary columns have correct currency and business logic noted
- [ ] Boolean/status columns have all enum values documented
- [ ] PII columns are tagged and masking noted

### Upstream Context Used
The AI had access to lineage data from `manifest.json` to ensure descriptions are consistent with upstream models.
